commit.message:
Refactor to separate Markets tab for one-to-many support

New schema:
  Questions: question_id, title, category, sort_order
  Markets:   question_id, platform, slug, label
  History:   question_id, timestamp, platform, slug, probability
  Annotations: question_id, date, note (unchanged)

Key changes:
- A question can now have multiple markets per platform
- Each market gets its own chart line with the label from the Markets tab
- Multiple markets on the same platform share color but use different
  dash styles (solid, dashed, dotted, dash-dot)
- History rows include slug to link data points to specific markets
- Apps Script reads Markets tab instead of platform columns in Questions
- Backfill functions updated to write slug column

commit.message:
feat(INV-6): route KG write ops through builtin:kg-mutate Skill (#111)

* feat(INV-6): route KG write ops through builtin:kg-mutate Skill

## Summary

KG IPC write operations (entity/relation create, update, delete)
previously called KnowledgeGraphService directly from IPC handlers,
violating INV-6 ('一切能力皆 Skill，统一接口').

This PR:
1. Creates builtin:kg-mutate Skill with SKILL.md manifest
2. Implements KgMutationSkill (validate → permission → execute pipeline)
3. Routes all 6 KG write IPC channels through the skill
4. Leaves read/query channels as direct service calls (INV-6 exempt:
   read-only, no side effects, no Permission Gate needed)
5. Adds 23 kgMutationSkill unit tests + 27 INV-6 routing tests

Closes #107

* fix: swap spread order so validated projectId wins over raw payload

Audit finding F1 (Codex): { projectId, ...payload } let payload overwrite validated value.
Now: { ...payload, projectId: request.projectId } ensures Stage 1 validation is effective.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add prompt field to kg-mutate SKILL.md (audit finding F-1)

Data-only skills still need a prompt placeholder to pass skillValidator.
Added prompt.system and prompt.user with descriptive N/A values.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: switch from upload/download-artifact to actions/cache to preserve file permissions

actions/upload-artifact strips executable bits, causing `playwright: command not found`
when the e2e job downloads node_modules and tries to run the playwright binary.
actions/cache uses tar and preserves all file permissions including executable bits.

Using `github.run_id` as the cache key ensures each run gets its own freshly installed
node_modules from the setup job.

Add Redis rate-limit, logging, and roles route

Enable optional Redis-backed rate limiting and structured logging. Adds ioredis and rate-limit-redis dependencies, a new src/config/redis.js client (activated when REDIS_URL is set) and integrates a Redis store into express-rate-limit while falling back to in-memory limiters when Redis is absent. Replaces morgan/console logs with a winston-based logger (src/utils/logger) that can toggle file transports via LOG_TO_FILE, and switches DB/server logs to use the logger. Adds request logging middleware, sets trust proxy for real client IPs, and registers a new /api/roles route (src/routes/role.routes.js) for STORE-scope role lookups. Updates .env.example with REDIS and LOG_TO_FILE notes, removes two obsolete migration files, and updates package.json/lock to include the new packages.

  - name: Install Helm

commit.message:
Establish UI/UX responsive design instructions & framework (Issue #195) (#198)

* docs: add comprehensive copilot instructions for UI/UX and API guidelines

- Design constants: breakpoints, test viewports, CSS variable names
- Responsive UI rules: mandatory CSS block inheritance, mobile-card tables, action buttons
- Theme support: light/dark mode requirements with no hardcoded colors
- Code reuse: macros/includes, shared JS/CSS, table row rendering
- API/backend: code reuse, security, limits/bounds, streaming, stable contracts
- Timezone support: UTC-at-rest requirement + client-side display conversion
- Python quality gate: auto-discovery linting + formatting command

Resolves #195

- Switch publish.mjs from raw npm publish to changeset publish so
  versions already on npm are skipped rather than erroring
- Output auth-angular ng-packagr dist to ./dist (local to package)
- Add publishConfig.directory so changeset publish uses the built dist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement Phase 1 — Tier 1 MVP signal detection

Signal checkers (src/lib/signals/):
- Google Safe Browsing API integration
- Homograph/lookalike domain detection (Unicode + substitution)
- Suspicious TLD list (.xyz, .top, .tk, etc.)
- HTTPS check
- Urgency/fear keyword scanner (23 patterns)
- Gmail DOM scraper for sender/domain mismatch

Scoring & UI:
- Risk scoring engine (weighted sum, capped at 100)
- Content script sends page-level signals to service worker
- Red warning banner injection for score 61+
- Popup shows fired signals in 'What we found' section
- .env.example for API key setup

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
